title: Are ETs Guided by a Higher Entity?
summary: A brief discussion about alleged extraterrestrial communication claiming that ETs are guided by an entity humans would call 'God.' The conversation also touches on ancient religious texts potentially describing alien intervention in human evolution.

key_claims.claim: An extraterrestrial being allegedly told human interrogators that the entity coordinating their activities is what humans would refer to as 'God,' but very different from human conceptions
Biblical stories, the Bhagavad Gita, and ancient texts describing vimanas and flying crafts may represent aliens intervening in the biological evolution of human beings
